title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a quantization technique from Google that optimizes KV cache and vector quantization to reduce VRAM requirements and GPU memory footprint. The method uses codebook-based quantization with mean squared error and inner product error optimization to compress model weights and activations.
